title: PARATHD-2993 Event ● Complete broadcast of "Stop Time" by art! All-you-can-eat mischief by stopping the movement of three beautiful women (2) - Hikaru Konno
description: ◆ Popular event ● Complete version of live broadcasting! Is it really an event? Let's check the full version of the broadcast without any deception! Practice all kinds of mischief to popular AV actresses whose time has stopped! ◆ Popular event ● Surgeon RED again! If you perform a live broadcast of the familiar event "Stop Time" in AV ... You will unknowingly show an embarrassing appearance that you can not see in AV! Various mischief while the time is stopped! It's going to be weird when time starts to move! MC Konno Hikaru-chan will also be the prey of the event ● at the end! Anyway, it cannot be expressed in short sentences. Let's all witness the historic moment again! You may also be captivated by the event! ??
